title: Infrastructure & Tools
summary: The underlying operational technologies that support enterprise service delivery.

technologies.name: Windows Server
technologies.context: Microsoft's enterprise OS. Nikhil handles service failures, performance issues, access problems, and post-patch incidents using Event Viewer and PowerShell.

technologies.name: VMware vSphere
technologies.context: Enterprise virtualization platform. Nikhil uses VMware for server validation during changes, patching coordination, and managing high availability.

technologies.name: Active Directory (AD)
technologies.context: Microsoft directory service for identity management. Nikhil manages user/group access, RBAC, UAM, and group policy requests.

technologies.name: BeyondTrust PAM
technologies.context: Privileged Access Management solution. Nikhil uses it for secure privileged access provisioning and approvals to reduce security risks.

technologies.name: SCCM & MFSA Patching
technologies.context: Microsoft systems for patch management. Nikhil coordinates patch scheduling, deployment, verification, and compliance reporting against Microsoft Security Fix Announcements.

technologies.name: NetApp ONTAP
technologies.context: Enterprise storage OS. Nikhil supports storage-related incident analysis and coordination.

technologies.name: ServiceNow & HPSM
technologies.context: Leading cloud ITSM platforms. Nikhil handles tickets, approvals, CMDB updates, and reporting for global operations.
